title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Usopp, Unknown person #1, Giants, Unknown person #2, Dorry, Unknown person #3 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf, West Village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not good!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Waah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: Cool!! The giant warrior pirates are fighting!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got a bad feelin' about this!! Get inside!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You mustn't look!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You've gotta come back to us, chiefs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Unlimited strength and bodies that regenerate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nothing beats this invingle feeling! It's so liberating!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Have a taste of our power!!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Cap'n Dorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: to think that the fiercely proud...

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: Giant Warrior Pirates would succumb to this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shame on you all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You damn idiots!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sun Realm, near the lift - Chopper's group

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop this!! We're comrades!! We've fought side by side!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't bring myself to hurt you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DDT!! Rhodes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't wanna cut us down?! What an excuse!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Join us, Kash!!! Having an invingle body is the best!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GYAAAH!! I thought they all went the other way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You can't "bring yourself" to hurt us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As if you could even if you wanted!! I dare you to try!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kashin!! If you get caught between them, you'll turn into a demon too!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
